title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Food Corporations Act, 1964. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1***. (3) It shall come into force on such date 2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 67 of 1972, s. 2 (w.e.f. 15-12-1972). 2 17th December, 1964, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1808, dated 16th December, 1964, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i).
